title: Verify INGEST uses only the public LEDGER contract
steps: Run preview, commit, resume, compatibility, validation, idempotency-conflict, and transaction-round-trip cases through the shared public operation executor and published binary; scan dependencies and paths for private LEDGER references.
expected: INGEST uses only released descriptors, requests, results, and errors; every accepted candidate records statement_import provenance and a stable idempotency key; private handlers, SQL, database paths, and domain types are unreachable; incompatible versions fail before parsing or mutation.
